profile.name: Iyed Mohamed
profile.title: Cloud & DevOps Engineering Student
profile.subtitle: Passionate about Cloud & DevOps
profile.bio: Cloud & DevOps Engineering Student at ESPRIT with hands-on experience designing private cloud infrastructures, automating deployments with Ansible & Kubernetes, and building full-stack applications. Microsoft Azure triple-certified (AZ-900, AI-900, DP-900) and AWS-trained.

projects.title: Multi-Service App – CI/CD with GitHub Actions & Docker Hub
projects.description: Microservices web app (React + Node.js API) with 3 isolated containers and separate Dockerfiles per service. Full GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline: automated testing, Docker image build & push to Docker Hub, SSH deployment in under 2 min. Docker Compose for local orchestration and environment variable management.

projects.title: Automated Log Monitoring & Alerting System
projects.description: Containerized monitoring stack (Prometheus + Grafana + Alertmanager) tracking 5+ custom metrics via Docker Compose. Custom Python exporter exposing app metrics to Prometheus; Grafana dashboards with Slack alerting on threshold breaches.

projects.title: Private Cloud Infrastructure – OpenStack Cluster
projects.description: 3-node private cloud (Controller + 2 Compute nodes) with 6 OpenStack services configured from scratch. Ansible playbooks reducing setup from 4h to under 15 min; Heat for IaC stack deployments. Kubernetes cluster (kubeadm) on OpenStack VMs with Deployments, Services, and Ingress.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio – Deployed on AWS EC2
projects.description: Dynamic portfolio with admin panel (Next.js + Node.js), deployed on AWS EC2 behind Nginx with SSL via Let's Encrypt. GitHub Actions pipeline: build → SSH deploy → Nginx reload. Elastic IP and DNS configured for production.

experiences.description: Containerized a Spring Boot + ReactJS ticketing platform using Docker & Docker Compose, reducing environment setup time by 60%. Wrote Ansible playbooks to automate server provisioning across dev/staging environments. Configured a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline (lint → test → build → deploy). Produced infrastructure architecture diagrams and runbooks.
Built a real-time chat app with private/group messaging, multimedia sharing, voice/video calls, JWT auth, and WebSocket rooms.
